title: Barkhausia gracilis
taxonomy: Barkhausia gracilis is a plant species that belongs to the family of flowering plants, specifically within the order of Laurales. It is classified under the genus Barkhausia, which is part of the family Hernandiaceae. The species name 'gracilis' is a Latin term meaning 'slender' or 'graceful', likely referring to the plant's physical characteristics. Barkhausia gracilis is a species that is native to tropical regions, where it grows as a shrub or small tree. The specific classification of Barkhausia gracilis provides insight into its botanical identity and evolutionary relationships.
